meta.description: Calculate your due date from last period, conception date, or IVF transfer date. Naegele's rule, gestational weeks, trimesters, countdown & milestones. Free, instant.

dueDate.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDate.description: Calculate your estimated due date from your last period, conception date, or IVF transfer date.
dueDate.howItWorksText: LMP method (Naegele's rule): First day of last period + 280 days (adjusted for cycle length). Conception method: Conception date + 266 days. IVF transfer: Transfer date + 261 days (day 5) or + 263 days (day 3). The due date is an estimate — only about 4% of babies arrive exactly on the EDD.
